title: University Policy Extraction Template
description: Domain-specific LLM output schema for higher education administrative documents.

chunk_summary.description: 2-3 sentence factual summary. Maps to raw_chunks.summary.

compiled_truth.description: Canonical synthesis. Maps to pages.compiled_truth — primary content for vector search and QA.

suggested_tags.description: 2-6 leaf tags selected from the available tag hierarchy. REQUIRED. Maps to tags table and page_tags junction.

name.description: Leaf tag name. Maps to tags.name.

label.description: Human-readable display name. Maps to tags.label.

parent_hint.description: ltree path prefix to the parent (e.g., 'document_type', 'functional_area.examinations'). Maps to ltree path: parent_hint.name.

effective_range.description: Content timeliness annotation. Maps to raw_chunks.effective_range and pages.effective_range (tstzrange).

start.description: Earliest applicable date (ISO 8601). null if not mentioned.

description.description: Natural language description (e.g., '2024-2025学年第一学期').

academic_year.description: Academic year in YYYY-YYYY format if applicable.

stale_risk.description: Staleness risk. low = stable/fundamental, medium = periodically updated, high = frequently changing.
